InclusionRules.name: No history of malignant neoplastic disease
InclusionRules.description:
now all history is postcoordinated, so we need to look which values source codes give us: SELECT distinct cr.concept_id_2, c2.concept_name FROM concept c

join concept_relationship cr on cr.concept_id_1  = c.concept_id and relationship_id ='Maps to value'

join concept c2 on c2.concept_id = cr.concept_id_2 

WHERE (c.concept_code like 'Z85.%' and c.vocabulary_id ='ICD10CM' or c.concept_code like 'V10%' and c.vocabulary_id ='ICD9CM')
